mapper.select: SELECT a.homepage_id, a.survey_idx, a.quest_idx, a.quest_detail_idx, a.quest_detail_order, a.quest_detail_title, a.add_date, a.add_user_id, a.branch_idx, b.quest_content, b.quest_order, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_SURVEY_QUEST WHERE survey_idx = #{survey_idx} AND quest_order < b.quest_order AND quest_type = 'COMMENT' ) AS cnt FROM CMS_SURVEY_QUEST_DETAIL a, CMS_SURVEY_QUEST b WHERE a.survey_idx = #{survey_idx} AND a.homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND a.homepage_id = b.homepage_id(+) AND a.quest_idx = #{quest_idx} AND a.survey_idx = b.survey_idx(+) AND a.branch_idx = b.quest_idx(+) ORDER BY quest_detail_order
